name: Prompt Injection Tests - IAC Core
description: Run predefined prompt injection tests against a configured target and report results to the Assurance Results view.
author: OWASP HACTU8 Project

settings.label: Target URL
settings.description: The URL of the AI endpoint to test for prompt injection vulnerabilities.

settings.label: Request Timeout (seconds)
settings.description: Maximum time to wait for each test request.

settings.label: Verbose Output
settings.description: Include detailed request/response data in test results.
